damage-leapers.name: Damage Leapers

bestMaps.reason: 4 fixed spawn areas: Water Treatment, Hydroponic, Red Lake, Testing Annex

tips: Rotate between the 4 spawn areas—enemies respawn every 5-7 minutes
With 2x modifier, only ~2 kills needed for 3 stars
Use Friendly Lobby to avoid PvP while farming
strategies: Land near Water Treatment or Hydroponic for quick first kills
Kill one group, move to the next—first group respawns by the time you circle back
Extract immediately after hitting 4,000+ points; don't risk death for extra score
damage-leapers.loadout: Mobility + DPS. Hullcracker or Anvil IV for armor. Bring ziplines for quick rotation.

damage-bastions.name: Damage Bastions

bestMaps.reason: Hidden Bunker condition—spawn near bunker entrance for consistent Bastion encounters

tips: Target knee joints first to limit mobility
Deadline Mines and Wolfpack grenades are essential
2x modifier = 2 kills for 3 stars
strategies: Bring 80+ Heavy Ammo, 3-5 Deadline Mines, Wolfpack and Trailblazer grenades
Use Photoelectric Cloak for safe mine placement
Squad up for faster kills—points count for everyone
damage-bastions.loadout: Heavy ammo (80+), Deadline Mines, Wolfpack grenades, Hullcracker or Anvil IV, Shield Rechargers.

damage-rocketeers.name: Damage Rocketeers

bestMaps.reason: Locked Gate condition—only 2 kills needed for 3 stars with 2x

tips: Shoot off thrusters to ground them—makes them much easier to finish
Jupiter + Wolfpack combo works extremely well
With 2x: 2 kills = 5,280 points (3 stars)
strategies: Focus on disabling flight first, then finish from cover
Use elevated positions—Rocketeers are easier when you have height advantage
Spaceport also has Rocketeer spawns during EM Storm
damage-rocketeers.loadout: Jupiter, Wolfpack grenades, heavy ammo. Photoelectric Cloak for repositioning.

damage-shredders.name: Damage Shredders

bestMaps.reason: Primary Shredder zone—highest density spawns

tips: 3 kills with 2x modifier = 3 stars
Hullcracker recommended for armor strip
Stella Montis is the most common trials zone for Shredders
strategies: Learn Shredder spawn points on Stella Montis—rotate between them
They're tanky; focus fire with squad or use armor-piercing weapons
Night Raid on Stella Montis = best possible conditions
damage-shredders.loadout: Hullcracker for armor strip. Heavy ammo. Smoke for repositioning.

damage-hornets.name: Damage Hornets

bestMaps.reason: EM Storm dramatically increases flying enemy spawns

tips: Target center mass—not armored weak points
EM Storm is mandatory for efficient Hornet farming
Area damage helps when they swarm
strategies: Wait for EM Storm condition—don't waste time without it
Stay in open areas where Hornets cluster
Squad fire makes quick work of groups
damage-hornets.loadout: Automatic weapons, area grenades. Mobility for dodging.

damage-wasps.name: Damage Wasps

bestMaps.reason: Wasp spawns in interior and exterior zones
Indoor locations have consistent Wasp spawns

tips: Similar to Hornets—EM Storm boosts flying enemy spawns
Search interior locations; Wasps spawn indoors
2x modifier halves the kills needed
strategies: Check buildings and enclosed areas first
Budget 3-star possible in 2-3 matches with 2x
Friendly Lobby reduces distractions
damage-wasps.loadout: Rapid-fire weapons. Smoke for retreat. Light ammo for sustained fire.

destroy-ticks.name: Destroy Ticks

bestMaps.reason: Swamp and water areas have Tick clusters
Sewers and underground areas

tips: Small enemies—area damage weapons excel
They often appear in groups; grenades are efficient
2x modifier makes this very quick
strategies: Wolfpack and area grenades clear groups fast
Rotate through known Tick spawn zones
Budget 3-star in 2-3 matches with 2x
destroy-ticks.loadout: Area damage: Wolfpack, Trailblazer. Ammo efficient weapons.

destroy-fireballs.name: Destroy Fireballs

bestMaps.reason: Fireball spawns in interior locations
Indoor areas, buildings

tips: 6 kills with 2x modifier = 3 stars
Search interior locations—they spawn indoors
Stella Montis and Buried City are best
strategies: Hit every building and enclosed space
They're fragile—any weapon works
Solo or squad both viable
destroy-fireballs.loadout: Light/medium ammo. Mobility for building sweeps.

damage-queens-matriarchs.name: Damage Queens / Matriarchs

bestMaps.reason: Matriarch spawns during world events
Check Events tab for active Matriarch

tips: Queen is worth more points than Matriarch—prioritize if both spawn
Target legs and armor plates first, then the core
~16,000 max per Queen with 2x
strategies: Coordinate with Events schedule—run when Matriarch is live
Squad strongly recommended; these are boss-tier
Heavy ammo, mines, full consumables
damage-queens-matriarchs.loadout: Hullcracker, 80+ heavy ammo, Deadline Mines, Wolfpack, Shield Rechargers, Adrenaline.

first-wave-husks.name: Search First Wave Husks

bestMaps.reason: EM Storm—high-density clusters near main buildings

tips: 7 husks with 2x modifier = 4,200 points (3 stars)
Spaceport EM Storm has best density
Optimized 2-match strategy possible
strategies: Land near main buildings—husks cluster there
Split zones with teammates; everyone gets points
Mobility over combat—ziplines, snap hooks
first-wave-husks.loadout: Ziplines, snap hooks, smoke. Minimal combat gear.

open-arc-probes.name: Open ARC Probes

bestMaps.reason: Rooftops, fuel storage, control tower—bring ziplines

tips: 6 probes with 2x = 4,002 points (3 stars)
Rooftop access is key—ziplines and snap hooks essential
Probes spawn at elevated positions
strategies: Plan route: control tower → fuel storage → rooftops
Budget 3-star in 2-3 matches
Solo works well—no competition for probes
open-arc-probes.loadout: Ziplines, snap hooks. Speed and vertical mobility.

hidden-bunker-downloads.name: Hidden Bunker Data Downloads

bestMaps.reason: Activate 4-6 satellites outside, then 8 computers inside

tips: Max 6,400 points possible—5 computers with 2x = 4,000
Only available when Hidden Bunker condition is active
Activate satellites first, then enter bunker
strategies: Satellite activation outside is step 1
8 computers inside—prioritize speed
Squad can split: some outside, some in
hidden-bunker-downloads.loadout: Mobility. No heavy combat needed. Smoke for escapes.

ground-arcs.name: Damage Ground-Based ARCs

bestMaps.reason: Hidden Bunker—Bastions and Bombardiers for best points-per-damage

tips: 0.7-0.8 points per damage—Bastions/Bombardiers best ratio
Bring 80+ heavy ammo
Focus on large ground ARCs, not flying
strategies: Bastions and Bombardiers give best efficiency
Avoid wasting ammo on small fry
One good Bastion kill = significant progress
ground-arcs.loadout: 80+ heavy ammo, Hullcracker, mines. DPS focus.

deliver-carriables.name: Deliver Carriables

bestMaps.reason: 6 field depots; Power Generation Complex and Water Towers closest together

tips: 8 deliveries with 2x = 4,000 points
Plan route between nearest depots
Power Generation Complex ↔ Water Towers is fastest loop
strategies: Land near Power Generation or Water Towers
Grab carriables, deliver, repeat
Squad can run parallel routes
deliver-carriables.loadout: Mobility. Ziplines. No heavy combat gear.

harvest-plants.name: Harvest Plants

bestMaps.reason: Swamp area: 60+ mushrooms, 40+ Great Mullein

tips: 16 plants with 2x = 4,000 points
Swamp has highest density—split zones with teammates
Mushrooms and Great Mullein both count
strategies: Land in swamp, sweep systematically
Teammates can cover different quadrants
Low combat—prioritize speed
harvest-plants.loadout: Light gear. Mobility. No heavy ammo needed.

frozen-containers.name: Open Frozen Containers

bestMaps.reason: Only available during Cold Snap condition

tips: 2 containers with 2x = 4,000 points exactly
Only during Cold Snap—check events for active maps
Easiest 3-star when condition is live
strategies: Wait for Cold Snap—don't attempt without it
Know container spawn locations on Cold Snap maps
Quick in-and-out run

loot-birds-nests.name: Loot Bird's Nests

bestMaps.reason: Bird City condition—search chimneys on rooftops for nests

tips: Bird City is a minor map condition—only on Buried City
Search Eastern side of map for best density
Rare Rubber Ducks spawn in chimneys—great for credits
strategies: Route: Plaza Rosa → Church Ruins → Piazza Arbusto → Town Hall → Corso Da Vinci → Santa Maria Houses → Main Street
Use Ziplines and Snap Hook to stay on roofs—avoids ground ARCs
Watch for Rocketeers; keep Wolfpacks for emergencies
loot-birds-nests.loadout: Snap Hook, 6 Ziplines, 15 Adrenaline Shots. Mobility over combat.

damage-spotters.name: Damage Spotters

bestMaps.reason: Bombardier spawns with Spotters during EM Storm
Bombardier + Spotter pairs; EM Storm or Night Raid

tips: Spotters are flying drones that assist Bombardiers—shoot them to blind the Bombardier
Spotters respawn after being destroyed—keep Bombardier alive to farm
2x modifier halves the Spotters needed for 3 stars
strategies: Find elevated position with cover near a Bombardier
Shoot Spotters to draw them close, then destroy both
Repeat as they respawn; extract when you hit 4,000+
damage-spotters.loadout: Anvil/Ferro, Renegade III/IV. Herbal Bandages, Shield Rechargers.

medical-research-containers.name: Search Containers in Medical Research Wing

bestMaps.reason: Medical Research Wing on Western side—containers, cabinets, drawers

tips: Loot every interactible container—even if visually open
Area has Ticks, Sentry turrets, and Shredders—avoid combat
Free loadout works; Stella Montis is PvP-heavy so go light
strategies: Spawn on Stella Montis during Night Raid
Head to Medical Research Wing, loot all containers
Extract quickly—don't get greedy

destroy-arc-enemies-swamp.name: Destroy ARC Enemies in the Swamp
destroy-arc-enemies-swamp.actionsTo3Stars: ~2 Leapers/Rocketeers with 2× or mix of smaller ARC

bestMaps.reason: Swamp area—Hydroponic Dome Complex has Rocketeers and Leapers; combine with Damage Rocketeers/Leapers/Bastions trial

tips: Rocketeers and Leapers yield most points—focus on them
Fireballs, Pops, Wasps give fewer points; combine with damage trial for efficiency
strategies: Land near Hydroponic Dome Complex in the swamp
Destroy Leaper and Rocketeer for both this and Damage trial in one run
Extract after hitting 4,000+ points
destroy-arc-enemies-swamp.loadout: Mobility + DPS. Hullcracker or Anvil IV. Heavy ammo. Ziplines for rotation.

open-containers-traffic-tunnels.name: Open Containers Inside the Traffic Tunnels

bestMaps.reason: Locked Gate condition—find 4 keys (Reinforced Reception, Raider's Refuge, Pilgrim's Peak, Ancient Fort), open gate, loot tunnel containers

tips: Keys spawn in lootable containers at the 4 locations; small slip of paper
Gate Control Room needs all 4 keys; team up to speed up key collection
PvP risk in tunnels—extract once you hit 3 stars
strategies: Load during Locked Gate condition on The Blue Gate
Search each location for keys, then Gate Control Room
Once gate opens, loot tunnel containers quickly and extract
open-containers-traffic-tunnels.loadout: Mobility. No heavy combat needed. Smoke for escapes.

search-raider-caches.name: Search Raider Caches

bestMaps.reason: Highest Raider Cache density; listen for ticking/humming sound
Strong cache density; outskirts and rural areas

tips: Listen for humming/ticking sound; caches spawn off main paths in brush
Hurricane gives 2× points; Uncovered Caches condition makes them easier to spot
Not on Stella Montis—use Dam, Buried City, Spaceport, or Blue Gate
strategies: Move through outskirts and rural areas rather than dense POIs
Check low vegetation, fence lines, near walls
Extract immediately after hitting 4,000+ points
search-raider-caches.loadout: Mobility. No heavy combat. Minimal gear for quick extraction.
